completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: extension type (Adobe CEP for Premiere Pro)
Found 8+ existing docs in docs/, 3 root .md files, 30+ BMAD artifacts
Tech stack: Vanilla JS ES6, ExtendScript JSX, OpenAI (gpt-4.1-mini/gpt-5.2), Claude CLI Sonnet, Python/Whisper, FFmpeg, lottie-web 5.12.2, Coloris, Axios
Exhaustive scan: 31 JS files, 7 HTML, 17 CSS, 1 JSX (3900 lines), 14 templates, 1 Python. API contracts, state management, UI components fully analyzed
Source tree documented with full annotations
Dev setup documented: prerequisites, installation, conventions, patterns
Architecture doc written: 4-layer diagram, 8 patterns, 3 data flows, security, ES3 constraints
All supporting docs written: project-overview, component-inventory, api-contracts, development-guide, source-tree-analysis
Master index generated with full navigation
Validation complete: all files verified, no incomplete markers
